---
title: "Project Data Options"
---

::: callout-important
Project data options are still being finalized, and will be completed by June 22, 2026.
:::

## Data Options for the Project

For your project you will need to find a data set that answers your question of interest! I have pre curated some data sets for you.

Before selecting a data set I recommend reading this: <https://www.icpsr.umich.edu/sites/icpsr/teaching-learning/build-your-data-skills/how-to-find-a-dataset>

### UN Data (2000-2025)

UN Data (2000-2025) includes various measures by country per year such as population, education, women in government, CO2 admissions.

-   Download [CSV](data/01_data/un_data.csv){download="un_data.csv"}

-   Download [Codebook](data/02_codebooks/un_data_codebook.pdf){download="un_data_codebook.pdf"}

Data collected from: UN Data (https://data.un.org)

### ANES (1948 - 2024)

American National Election Survey includes responses from individuals in the US on various feeling thermamaters for parties and social groups and includes demographic questions.

-   Download [CSV](data/01_data/anes.csv){download="anes.csv"}

-   Download [Codebook](data/02_codebooks/anes_codebook.pdf){download="anes_codebook.pdf"}

Data collected from: ANES (https://electionstudies.org)

### US Migration Data

The US migration data includes data on migrants, deportations, and migrant deaths at the US-Mexican border.

-   Download [CSV](data/01_data/immigration.csv){download="immigration.csv"}

-   Download [Codebook](data/02_codebooks/immigration_codebook.docx){download="immigration_codebook.docx"}

Data collected from: DHS Office of Immigration Statistics (removals/apprehensions), TRAC Immigration (deportation reasons by criminality), ICE Arrest Data (monthly, 2008–2018)

### Violence and Democracy Data

The Violence and Democracy Data includes data on different forms of violence such as conflicts and protests and democracy index scores.

Africa

-   Download [CSV](data/01_data/acled_africa.csv){download="acled_africa.csv"}

-   Download [Codebook](data/02_codebooks/acled_africa_codebook.pdf){download="acled_africa_codebook.pdf"}

Asia

-   Download [CSV](data/01_data/acled_asia.csv){download="acled_asia.csv"}

-   Download [Codebook](data/02_codebooks/acled_asia_codebook.pdf){download="acled_asia_codebook.pdf"}

Europe

-   Download [CSV](data/01_data/acled_europe.csv){download="acled_europe.csv"}

-   Download [Codebook](data/02_codebooks/acled_europe_codebook.pdf){download="acled_europe_codebook.pdf"}

Latin America

-   Download [CSV](data/01_data/acled_latin_america.csv){download="acled_latin_america.csv"}

-   Download [Codebook](data/02_codebooks/acled_latin_america_codebook.pdf){download="acled_latin_america_codebook.pdf"}

US and Canada

-   Download [CSV](data/01_data/acled_us_and_canada.csv){download="acled_us_and_canada.csv"}

-   Download [Codebook](data/02_codebooks/acled_us_and_canada_codebook.pdf){download="acled_us_and_canada_codebook.pdf"}

Data collected from: ACLED (https://acleddata.com), and VDEM (https://v-dem.net)
